title: Keeping Goldfish
description: Upgrade to a larger tank and care for a single fancy goldfish.

dialogue.text: Goldfish produce a lot of waste, so they need a spacious tank and powerful filtration to stay healthy.
Aim for at least a seventy-five liter aquarium for a single fancy goldfish. Larger volumes over one hundred fifty liters are even better.
Keep the water cool, around eighteen to twenty-two degrees Celsius, and perform regular water changes to maintain quality.
Offer a varied diet of pellets and fresh vegetables. With proper care your goldfish will thrive for many years.
